summary: Frontend-only E2E test of the unified PaginationFooter across Contratos, Fitosanitarios and regression on Tratamientos/Cosechas/Tareas/Visitas/Albaranes. All 6 pagination flows work correctly. PaginationBar.jsx confirmed deleted; no remaining imports. All required data-testids verified.

contratos.filter_recalc: OK - typing unlikely text hides footer (totalItems=0 -> null, expected)

fitosanitarios.filter_reset_to_page1: OK - at page 79 with 1970, typing 'GLIFOSATO' resets to page 1 with 34 productos / 2 pages; clearing restores 1970

regression_other_pages.cosechas: loads, no errors, 0 items so footer hidden (correct)
regression_other_pages.albaranes: loads, no errors, 0 items so footer hidden (correct)

critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking: React DOM hydration warnings observed in console (span inside th/tr/td/select). These originate from the Emergent visual-editor overlay wrappers (data-ve-dynamic span with display:contents) injected in the preview environment, NOT from the app code. No developer action needed.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded data (400 contratos, 1970 productos, 3 tratamientos).
context_for_next_testing_agent: PaginationFooter/usePagination unification is complete and verified across Contratos, Fitosanitarios and other pages. Every screen using pagination uses testIdSuffix, so data-testids follow pattern pagination-footer-{suffix}, select-page-size-{suffix}, pag-first/prev/next/last-{suffix}. Contratos filter search input placeholder is 'Buscar contratos...'; Fitosanitarios uses data-testid='filter-search' with placeholder 'Nombre, registro, materia activa...'.
